Seamless: Yes — invisible under clothing

settings.content_2:
Choose by weight:
S: 42.5 to 50 kg (93 to 110 lbs)
M: 50 to 57.5 kg (110 to 127 lbs)
L: 57.5 to 65 kg (127 to 143 lbs)
XL: 65 to 72.5 kg (143 to 160 lbs)

If between sizes or your daily bra size is larger, choose one size up for maximum comfort.
settings.content_3:

settings.content_4:
Hand wash in cold water with mild detergent
Air dry flat — do not tumble dry
Do not bleach or iron
Store flat to maintain shape

settings.q1: Does it really help with posture?
settings.a1: Yes. The built-in back band gently pulls your shoulders into alignment throughout the day. Many customers report reduced upper back and shoulder tension within the first week of regular wear.
settings.q2: Is it comfortable for all-day wear?
settings.a2: Absolutely. The wireless design with soft moulded cups has zero poking or digging. The seamless fabric is breathable and moisture-wicking making it comfortable even during workouts or long days at the office.
settings.q3: Will it show under tight clothing?
settings.a3: No. The seamless smooth finish is completely invisible under fitted shirts dresses and blouses. No bumps no lines no visible straps.
settings.q4: How do I choose the right size?
settings.a4: Our bra fits a wide range of sizes. S/M fits band sizes 32-36 with cups A to C. L/XL fits band sizes 38-42 with cups B to D. If you're between sizes we recommend sizing up for maximum comfort.
settings.a5: Yes. The moulded cups have light non-removable padding that gives a natural shape without adding bulk. It smooths and shapes without making you look larger.
settings.q6: Can I wear it while working out?
settings.a6: Yes for low to medium impact activities like yoga pilates walking and daily movement. For high-impact cardio or running we recommend a dedicated sports bra for extra support.
settings.q7: How is it different from regular bras?
settings.a7: Regular bras focus only on support. Ours combines posture correction wireless comfort and seamless design in one. Most customers say it's the only bra they wear after trying it.
settings.a8: We offer a 30-day no-questions-asked return policy. If you are not completely satisfied send it back for a full refund. Free shipping on all US orders.
